allow: Bash(node -e "const r=require\('./lh.json'\); for \(const [k,v] of Object.entries\(r.categories\)\) console.log\(k, Math.round\(v.score*100\)\); console.log\('--- perf audits below 0.9:'\); for \(const ref of r.categories.performance.auditRefs\){const a=r.audits[ref.id]; if\(a.score!==null&&a.score<0.9&&ref.weight>0\) console.log\(a.id,a.score,a.displayValue||''\)}")

Bash(node -e "const r=require\('./lh.json'\); for \(const [k,v] of Object.entries\(r.categories\)\) console.log\(k, Math.round\(v.score*100\)\); console.log\('--- weighted perf audits <0.9:'\); for \(const ref of r.categories.performance.auditRefs\){const a=r.audits[ref.id]; if\(a.score!==null&&a.score<0.9&&ref.weight>0\) console.log\(a.id,a.score,a.displayValue||''\)}; console.log\('--- seo/a11y/bp fails:'\); for\(const c of ['seo','accessibility','best-practices']\) for \(const ref of r.categories[c].auditRefs\){const a=r.audits[ref.id]; if\(a.score!==null&&a.score<1\) console.log\(c,a.id,a.score\)}")
Bash(node -e "const r=require\('./lh.json'\); const a=r.audits['color-contrast']; for\(const it of a.details.items\) console.log\(it.node.selector, '|', \(it.node.explanation||''\).slice\(0,150\)\)")
Bash(sed -i 's/font-display text-lg font-bold/font-display text-xl font-bold/g' Hero.astro Pakej.astro BookingForm.astro)

Bash(node -e "const r=require\('./lh2.json'\); for \(const [k,v] of Object.entries\(r.categories\)\) console.log\(k, Math.round\(v.score*100\)\); const cc=r.audits['color-contrast']; console.log\('color-contrast:', cc.score, cc.details?cc.details.items.length+' items':''\)")
